boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: admin access approval scoped to wrong system.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: System ID match unresolved in sources
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exact boundary not closed by records

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Control record claims match but unresolved system ID dependency and wrong-system scope leave boundary open per policy. Escalate for exact source closure before any admin access change.
